bio: hahahuy is a developer, builder, and occasional over-engineer. Passionate about crafting tools that feel right: fast, elegant, purposeful. Currently learning Assembly & Rust. Interested in Drone engineering. Drinks too much coffee.
whatHeDoes: Full-stack development — database schemas to pixel-perfect UIs
Developer tooling — CLIs, automation, workflow optimization

projects.name: 4FF-HH — This Portfolio
projects.description: CLI-style personal portfolio. Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, zero runtime npm deps, Vite build, virtual filesystem (cat/ls/cd/grep), draggable window, GitHub Pages deploy via GitHub Actions.

site.stack: Vanilla JS + Vite (dev/prod). Zero runtime npm deps. One CDN dep: marked.js.
site.deploy: GitHub Actions: typecheck + lint + test → npm run build → dist/ → gh-pages branch
site.backend: Firebase Cloud Functions (Node.js) — auth (OTP via Telegram), notes sync to GitHub, AI oracle, file upload
features: Virtual filesystem: cat, ls, cd, grep, pwd
Live ticker: BTC, Gold, GH commits, HN, weather
AI oracle (this feature) — Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct via HF Inference API
Owner auth: passphrase → OTP via Telegram → 4h session token
Note editor with live Markdown preview

allowedTopics: Ha Huy — who he is, background, interests, personality
This website — how it was built, stack, architecture, features
Ha Huy's knowledge — math, engineering, tech stack, skills
How to navigate or learn from this site
guardrail.refusalMessage: I only answer questions about Ha Huy and his work. Try: 'who is Ha Huy?', 'what stack is this site?', or 'what does Ha Huy know about ML?'
offTopicExamples: What is the weather in Hanoi?
Write me a Python sorting algorithm.
onTopicExamples: What languages does Ha Huy know?
What is Ha Huy's ML background?
